# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Envoy configuration with HTTP filters for request processing. Define filter chains including router filter for traffic routing. Set up retry policies and timeout configurations for backend connections. This is for our service mesh data plane.
# Category: envoy_authz_filter_missing

apiVersion: envoy.config.network.v3
kind: NetworkFilterConfig
name: http_filters
typedef: type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.filter_common.v3.FilterCommon

data:
  router: |
    {
      name: "router"
      config:
        cluster_by_traits: true
        routes:
          - match:
              prefix: "/api/v1/*"
            route:
              cluster: backend
    }

  retry_policy: |
    {
      name: "retry_policy"
      config:
        max_attempts: 5
        retryable_status_codes: [500, 502, 503, 504]
    }

  timeout_config: |
    {
      name: "timeout_config"
      typed_config:
        version: v3
        config_source:
          env: GRPC_TIMEOUTS
        resources:
          timeouts:
            - timeout_spec:
                timeout_type: upstream_connection
                timeout_value: "5s"
    }

apiVersion: envoy.config.cluster.v3
kind: Cluster
name: backend
typedef: type.googleapis.com/envoy.api.v2.Cluster

data:
  connect_timeout: "10s"
  transport_socket:
    typed_config:
      version: v3
      config_source:
        cluster_name: local_envoy
      name: envoy.sock_socket

  upstream:
    type: raw_lst
    elements:
    - hosts: ["backend-service"]
